rationale: Review 2's blocking finding is factually wrong: Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map's first argument maps the left tensor factor (K) and second maps the right (A), so (BialgHom.id K K) f is the correct scalar-extension map -- identity on scalars, f on the algebra -- exactly as map_tmul confirms. Acting on Review 2's suggested swap would break the code, while Review 1's clean approve is correct.
